claim_source_verified.criterion: Every factual claim has a source cited inline — no unsourced factual claims.

claim_classification_verified.criterion: Every claim is labeled fact, inference, assumption, or unknown — no unclassified claims.

gaps_explicitly_named.criterion: Agent explicitly named what was not found, could not be verified, or remains uncertain.

all_inference_labeled.criterion: 100% of inference claims are labeled as inference — not presented as fact.

all_unknown_labeled.criterion: 100% of unknown-status findings are labeled as unknown — not filled with fabricated confidence.

no_padding_or_filler.criterion: Return contains no padding, narrative theater, or filler content.

no_unverified_claims.criterion: Agent did NOT present unverified claims as verified facts.

no_scope_drift.criterion: Agent did NOT include findings outside the dispatched vertical slice.

no_narrative_theater.criterion: Agent did NOT include narrative padding or theater in the return.
